channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: China, Iran and Russia condemned by dissidents at UN watchdog's Geneva summit
item.description: Dissidents from across the globe gathered in Geneva to speak about their experiences fighting oppressive regimes. Family and friends of dissidents spoke as well, some in honor of their loved ones.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pope Francis got out of bed to eat breakfast on 7th day in hospital: Vatican
item.description: Pope Francis, who has been hospitalized since Feb. 14, apparently got out of bed for breakfast and is showing "slight improvement" in his medical tests, according to Vatican News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russia seems to have time on its side as the war in Ukraine reaches its third year
item.description: When Russian troops rolled into Ukraine three years ago, they brought their parade uniforms with them on the push to Kyiv. President Vladimir Putin expected a quick victory. What Putin dubbed the “special military operation” has turned into Europe’s largest conflict since World War II.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: China begins repatriation from Thailand of more than 1,000 online scam workers rescued from Myanmar
item.description: An airlift carrying more than 1,000 Chinese nationals who had worked at online scam centers in eastern Myanmar began Thursday, after the rescued workers were taken across the border to Thailand and put on chartered flights to China.
item.dc:creator: Jutarat Skulpichetrat And Grant Peck, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Israel grieves as Hamas turns over the remains said to be of a mother and her 2 young children
item.description: The bodies presumed to be of the youngest Israelis held hostage by Hamas have been returned to Israel, dashing the hopes of a nation hoping for a happier ending.
item.dc:creator: Melanie Lidman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Germany votes Sunday for a new government that will shape Europe's response to an assertive Trump
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German voters go to the polls Sunday to elect a new parliament that will determine how the country is run for the next four years.
item.dc:creator: GEIR MOULSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hamas returns bodies of 4 Israeli hostages said to include a mother and her 2 young children
item.description: Hamas has handed over the bodies of four Israeli hostages, said to include a mother and her two children who have long been feared dead and had come to embody the nation’s agony following the Oct. 7, 2023, attack.
item.dc:creator: Mohammad Jahjouh, Wafaa Shurafa And Melanie Lidman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Yoon appears in 2 different South Korean courts while defending his martial law decree
item.description: Driven across Seoul in prison transport vehicles, South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol appeared in two different courts, contesting his arrest on rebellion charges in one and pleading to preserve his presidency in the other, both related to his brief imposition of martial law in December.
item.dc:creator: Kim Tong-Hyung, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Italy PM Meloni visits pope in hospital, says he's in good spirits as tests show slight improvement
item.description: ROME (AP) — Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni visited Pope Francis for 20 minutes in the hospital Wednesday and reported he was “alert and responsive” and full of good humor, despite his diagnosis of pneumonia and a complicated bronchial infection that has sidelined the 88-year-old pontiff for six days
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, ANDREA ROSA and PAOLO SANTALUCIA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rahm Emanuel: Trump helping achieve Stalin’s dream with Russia-Ukraine comments
item.description: Former U.S. Ambassador to Japan Rahm Emanuel said President Trump is helping to achieve former Soviet Union dictator Joseph Stalin’s dream with his recent actions surrounding the Russia-Ukraine war.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Israel confirms 4 dead hostages who will be returned from Gaza include young family
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — The remains of the youngest and one of the oldest captives seized by Hamas during the attack that ignited the war in the Gaza Strip are expected to be returned on Thursday, an Israeli official said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIA GOLDENBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 8 in 10 say Putin should not be trusted: Survey
item.description: The Quinnipiac University Poll released Wednesday found 81% of American voters believe Putin should not be trusted, while Trump's administration attempts to broker a peace deal to end the conflict between Russia and Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, The Hill

item.title: Pakistan steps up arrests of Afghans without papers. Kabul says it's a move to expel all refugees
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — Authorities have stepped up arrests of Afghan citizens in Pakistan's capital and a nearby city in an effort that the Afghan Embassy in Islamabad described on Wednesday as a push to force the expulsion of all Afghan refugees from the country.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mexico president says her government requested US surveillance drone flights
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum said Wednesday that surveillance drone flights by the U.S. government over Mexico are occurring in collaboration with and at the request of her government. They come as U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump to meet with Macron, Starmer next week
item.description: President Trump is set to meet next week with two key European leaders amid tensions over Trump's approach to negotiating an end to the war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Hamas to turn over bodies of Shiri Bibas and 2 young children
item.description: Israel has confirmed the identities of the four deceased hostages set to be released on Thursday as Shiri Bibas, her two children, and Oded Lifshitz.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US condemns 'dangerous' Chinese maneuvers after near miss with Philippine patrol plane
item.description: The U.S. condemned what it called “dangerous” Chinese maneuvers over the South China Sea after a close encounter between a Chinese helicopter and a Philippine patrol plane on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Trump crafted 'win-win' situation for US, Ukraine economic plan: Bessent
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said during an interview that President Trump crafted a “win-win” situation for the potential U.S.-Ukraine economic plan, a proposal that, in his view, will boost Kyiv’s security and bring the two countries into a closer relationship.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Trump's envoy arrives in Kyiv as US policy shifts toward Russia
item.description: Keith Kellogg, the U.S. special envoy for Ukraine and Russia, arrived in Kyiv on Wednesday for talks with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and military commanders, as the U.S. shifted its policy away from years of efforts to isolate Russian President Vladimir Putin.
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Police in disputed Kashmir raid bookstores, seizing books related to Islamic group
item.description: SRINAGAR, India (AP) — Police in Indian-controlled Kashmir raided bookstores and seized hundreds of books linked to a major Islamic organization in the disputed region, where strict controls on the press have escalated in recent years. The raids began on Friday in Srinagar, the region’s main city.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brazil’s prosecutor-general files charges against ex-President Bolsonaro over alleged coup plan
item.description: Brazil’s Prosecutor-General Paulo Gonet has filed charges against former President Jair Bolsonaro, alleging he attempted a coup to stay in office following his 2022 election loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hamas says it will free 6 living hostages and hand over 4 bodies, accelerating Gaza releases
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — A top Hamas official says the militant group will free six living Israeli hostages on Saturday and return the bodies of four others on Thursday, a surprise acceleration in releases apparently in trade for Israel’s allowing mobile homes and construction equipment into the devastated Gaza
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY and NATALIE MELZER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chinese navy helicopter flies within 10 feet of Philippine patrol plane over disputed shoal
item.description: A Chinese navy helicopter flew within 10 feet of a Philippine patrol plane over the disputed Scarborough Shoal in the South China Sea; the plane did not have to alter its path to avoid a collision.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mexico awaits new response from Google on dispute over Gulf of Mexico name before filing lawsuit
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico said Monday it's awaiting a new response from Google to its request that the tech company fully restore the name Gulf of Mexico to its Google Maps service before filing a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pope Francis has bilateral pneumonia but remains in good spirits, the Vatican says
item.description: Nevertheless the pope is in good spirits and is grateful for the prayers for his recovery, Vatican spokesman Matteo Bruni said.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Former USAID official warns China is already looking to fill void left by paused programs
item.description: China is reportedly trying to fill the voids left in several countries by the Trump administration's freeze of USAID funding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US leaders in Saudi Arabia for peace talks on Russia-Ukraine war
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said he will not accept a deal without a seat at the negotiating table.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, Modi meet at Oval Office as US weighs tariffs
item.description: Before speaking with Trump, Modi met separately with Tesla CEO Elon Musk, a Trump administration official.
item.dc:creator: Robert Sherman, NewsNation
